groups.pageDescription: Create or join a private group to follow your friends' PlayFunded progress.
groups.purchaseRequiredTitle: Buy a challenge to unlock groups
groups.purchaseRequiredBody: Groups are only available after your first challenge purchase. Once you have a challenge, you can create or join one private group.
groups.createBody: Choose a name and we will generate a private invite code for your friends.
groups.joinBody: Enter the code from a friend to join their group instantly.
groups.groupIntro: Track progress, stats, and recent activity from everyone in your group. Only members can see this page.
groups.groupLeaderboardBody: Ranked by current challenge P&L percentage.
groups.privacyBody: Your friends see progress and pick units by default. Exact stake amounts are hidden unless you opt in.
groups.memberToolsBody: You can leave this group anytime and join another one.
groups.deleteConfirm: Delete this group for everyone? This cannot be undone.
groups.alreadyInGroup: You are already in a group.
groups.stakeAmountsVisible: This member opted in to show exact stake amounts.
groups.stakeAmountsHidden: Exact stake amounts are hidden; stakes are shown as account units.

groups.error_invalid_user: That member could not be found.
groups.error_purchase_required: You need to buy a challenge before using groups.
groups.error_already_in_group: You are already in a group. Leave or delete it before joining another one.
groups.error_already_owns_group: You already own a group. Delete it before creating a new one.
groups.error_group_not_found: No group was found for that code.
groups.error_not_group_owner: Only the group owner can do that.
groups.error_owner_must_delete: Group owners must delete the group instead of leaving.
groups.error_not_in_group: You are not in a group.
groups.error_member_not_found: That member is not in your group.
groups.error_code_generation_failed: We could not generate a code. Try again.

home.meta_title: PlayFunded — We put the risk, you get the wins
home.meta_description: PlayFunded: Latin America's first sports prop trading firm. Pass 2 evaluation phases, earn a funded account up to $25,000 with up to 80% profit split. From $19.99.
home.hero_subtitle: Prove your sports trading skill across two phases and earn a funded account. We supply the capital — you keep up to 80% of the profits.
home.hero_subtitle_review: Prove your sports trading skill through a two-phase evaluation. Availability, payout options, and commercial terms remain subject to country review.
home.countryPolicyReview: Country availability, payout methods, and gift purchases can change while compliance review is still open.
home.feature_capital_desc: We fund your account after you pass the evaluation. You never risk our capital — only your entry fee.
home.feature_payouts_desc: Up to 80% profit split paid monthly. No lock-in, no waiting period.
home.feature_eval_desc: Two phases, 15 picks minimum each. Hit +20% and you're funded.
home.feature_sports_desc: Soccer, Basketball, NFL, Tennis & MMA. More leagues added regularly.
home.feature_fee_desc: From $19.99. No monthly subscription. No hidden fees.
home.testimonials_subtitle: From Starter to Legend — real results from real traders.
home.step1_desc: Choose your tier from $500 to $25K simulated bankroll. Pay a one-time entry fee to unlock Phase 1.
home.step2_desc: Hit +20% profit in Phase 1, then +20% in Phase 2. Minimum 15 picks each. Stay within the risk rules.
home.step3_desc: Pass both phases and receive a funded account. Trade with our capital and earn up to 80% of all profits.
home.step3_desc_review: Pass both phases and move into the funded stage. Payout eligibility, methods, and commercial terms depend on market approval.
home.tiers_subtitle: All tiers follow the same two-phase process.
home.sports_subtitle: Trade the leagues you know best.
home.sports_leagues: Liga MX · Copa Libertadores · Premier League · NBA · NFL · ATP/WTA · UFC
home.cta_subtitle: Join hundreds of traders proving their edge on PlayFunded.
home.cta_subtitle_review: Review the challenge structure, country availability, and payout conditions before you purchase.
home.cta_disclaimer: Entry fees are non-refundable. Payouts are based on simulated performance.
home.cta_disclaimer_review: Entry fees are non-refundable. Payout timing, methods, and eligibility remain subject to KYC and country review.
home.faq_subheading: Everything you need to know about PlayFunded
home.faq_a1: PlayFunded is the first sports prop trading firm built for Latin America. You pay a one-time entry fee (from $19.99), complete two evaluation phases using simulated funds, and earn a real funded account with up to 80% profit split. You never risk more than your entry fee.
home.faq_q2: How does the two-phase challenge work?
home.faq_a2: Phase 1 requires you to reach +20% profit with a minimum of 15 picks. Phase 2 repeats the same criteria. Pass both phases and you receive a fully funded trading account. Risk rules include a 15% max drawdown limit and 10% daily loss limit.
home.faq_q3: How much can I earn with PlayFunded?
home.faq_a3: Funded traders keep 70% to 80% of all profits depending on their challenge tier (Pro: 70%, Elite: 80%). We offer accounts from $500 up to $25,000 in simulated bankroll during evaluation. Once funded, you trade with real PlayFunded capital and receive monthly payouts.
home.faq_q4: Which sports and leagues are available?
home.faq_a4: PlayFunded covers Soccer (Liga MX, Premier League, LaLiga, Champions League), Basketball (NBA, WNBA), NFL, Tennis, and MMA (UFC). More leagues and sports are being added continuously.
home.faq_a5: Yes. PlayFunded uses simulated funds during evaluation, meaning you never risk more than your entry fee. We are the trusted Latin American alternative to English-language prop trading firms, with transparent rules and real monthly payouts.

howItWorks.pageSubtitle: A two-phase evaluation to prove your skill, then real payouts from a funded account.
howItWorks.pageSubtitleReview: A two-phase evaluation to prove your skill. Country availability and payout terms remain subject to review.
howItWorks.countryPolicyReview: This market is still under review. Do not rely on universal payout, affiliate, or gift availability.
howItWorks.phase1_desc: Reach +20% profit from your starting balance in at least 15 picks. Stay within daily loss and drawdown limits.
howItWorks.phase2_desc: Start fresh. Reach +20% profit in at least 15 more picks. Same risk rules apply.
howItWorks.funded_desc: Trade with a real simulated bankroll and request payouts of up to 80% of your profits on demand.
howItWorks.funded_desc_review: Trade with a funded simulated bankroll. Payout eligibility, methods, and commercial terms depend on your market and compliance approval.
howItWorks.payout_desc: Once you're funded and have positive P&L, you can request a payout during the monthly window ({payoutWindow}). Here's what to know:
howItWorks.payout_desc_review: Funded accounts may become eligible for payouts after KYC and market approval. Availability, methods, and timing depend on your country.
howItWorks.payout_kyc: KYC (identity verification) is required before your first payout
howItWorks.payout_methods: Methods: dLocal bank transfer (Pix in Brazil), USDT, USDC, Bitcoin
howItWorks.payout_methods_review: Methods are enabled market by market after processor and compliance approval.
howItWorks.payout_timing: Payout requests open monthly ({payoutWindow}). Final timing depends on method and country.
howItWorks.payout_timing_review: If payouts are enabled in your market, requests open during {payoutWindow}. Final timing depends on method and country.
howItWorks.payout_split: Your profit split: 70% standard, up to 80% for elite traders
howItWorks.payout_split_review: Profit split terms are configured per market and should not be treated as universally available until approved.

faq.pageSubtitle: Everything you need to know about PlayFunded.
faq.q_what_a: PlayFunded is a sports prop trading firm platform for Latin America. You buy a challenge, prove your sports trading skill across two phases, and get a funded account where you earn real payouts — up to 80% of your profits.
faq.q_what_a_review: PlayFunded is a sports trading evaluation platform. You buy a challenge, prove your sports trading skill across two phases, and move into funded access if your market permits the commercial terms.
faq.q_latam_q: Is PlayFunded available in my country?
faq.q_latam_a: PlayFunded is available throughout Latin America, plus Spain and the United Kingdom. It is not available in the United States.
faq.q_latam_a_review: Availability, checkout methods, and payout methods vary by country. Some markets are public review markets and some are blocked entirely, including the United States.
faq.q_real_money_q: Am I trading with real money?
faq.q_real_money_a: During the challenge phases, your bankroll is simulated. Once you pass both phases and become funded, you trade on a funded simulated account and receive real payouts based on your performance.
faq.q_real_money_a_review: Challenge and funded balances are simulated. Payouts, where enabled, are based on simulated performance and remain subject to KYC, method availability, and country approval.
faq.q_phases_a: Phase 1 requires +20% profit from your starting balance in a minimum of 15 picks. Phase 2 requires +20% profit from a fresh starting balance in 15 more picks. Both phases require staying within the risk rules.
faq.q_fail_q: What happens if I fail a challenge?
faq.q_fail_a: In phase challenges, if you breach the drawdown (−15%) or daily loss (−10%) limits, your challenge ends. Funded accounts are only subject to the overall drawdown (−15%) — no daily loss limit applies. You can buy a new challenge at any time.
faq.q_retry_q: Can I retry a failed challenge?
faq.q_retry_a: Yes. There's no limit on retries. Each challenge is independent, requires its own entry fee, and those fees are {refundable}.
faq.q_min_picks_q: Why are there minimum picks required?
faq.q_min_picks_a: The minimum of 15 picks per phase ensures that your profitability is demonstrated over a statistically meaningful sample, not just a lucky streak.
faq.q_drawdown_a: Drawdown is calculated from the starting balance of each phase. If your balance falls more than 15% below that starting balance, the challenge ends. Funded accounts use the same rule (no daily loss limit applies when funded).
faq.q_daily_reset_q: When does the daily loss limit reset?
faq.q_daily_reset_a: The daily loss limit applies during Phase 1 and Phase 2 only. It resets every day at 00:00 UTC, with your starting balance for the day recorded at that point. Funded accounts have no daily loss limit.
faq.q_stake_limit_q: Is there a maximum stake per pick?
faq.q_stake_limit_a: Yes. The maximum stake per pick is 5% of your starting balance for the current phase.
faq.q_payout_when_q: When can I request a payout?
faq.q_payout_when_a: Once you're in the funded phase with positive P&L above your starting balance, you can request payouts during the monthly window ({payoutWindow}).
faq.q_payout_when_a_review: Payout requests are only available in approved markets after KYC. If your market is still under review, funded access does not guarantee immediate payout availability.
faq.q_kyc_q: Why do I need to verify my identity (KYC)?
faq.q_kyc_a: Identity verification is required before your first payout to comply with financial regulations and prevent fraud.
faq.q_methods_q: What payment methods are available for payouts?
faq.q_methods_a: We currently support crypto payouts in USDT, USDC, and Bitcoin.
faq.q_methods_a_review: Payout methods are enabled market by market after processor and compliance approval.
faq.q_time_q: How long does a payout take?
faq.q_time_a: Payout requests are submitted during the monthly window ({payoutWindow}). Delivery timing depends on method and destination country.
faq.q_time_a_review: If payouts are enabled in your market, delivery timing depends on the method, destination country, and review status.
faq.q_affiliate_q: How does the affiliate program work?
faq.q_affiliate_a: Join the affiliate program from your dashboard and get a unique referral link. You earn 5% commission on every challenge fee paid by your referrals (10% for top affiliates). Commissions are paid to your preferred method.
faq.q_affiliate_a_review: You can apply through the public affiliate program, but approval is manual. Only approved affiliates receive a code, dashboard, and conversion tools.
faq.q_gift_q: Can I buy a challenge as a gift?
faq.q_gift_a: Yes! On the challenges page, you can purchase a challenge as a gift. The recipient receives a unique redemption link by email to activate their challenge.
faq.q_gift_a_review: Gift purchases are disabled in review markets until legal, processor, and copy approvals are complete.
faq.q_sports_a: We cover soccer (Liga MX, Copa Libertadores, Premier League, and more), basketball (NBA), American football (NFL), tennis (ATP/WTA), and MMA (UFC/Bellator). Market types: moneyline, handicap (spread), and totals.
faq.countryPolicyReview: Country availability, payout methods, and gift purchases can change while compliance review is still open.
faq.contact_desc: Our support team typically responds within a few hours.
